heroHeadline: Ben-Gvir Details Plans for Palestinian 'Death Row' Inside Israeli Prisons
heroSubtitle: Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir announced plans on April 5 to establish a Palestinian 'death row', drawing international condemnation. Earlier today, footage emerged of an IDF military dog attacking a Palestinian man inside a West Bank mosque. Gaza Phase 2 ceasefire negotiations remain frozen — 689 Palestinians killed since October 2025 ceasefire.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
